questionHtml:
How many moles of FeS2 are required to produce 32 g of SO2? (Ar: S = 32, O = 16)

4FeS2 (s) + 11O2 (g) → 2Fe2O3 (s) + 8SO2 (g)

 

A.   0.25

B.   0.50

C.   1.0

D.   2.0
